message:
fix(storage): prevent symlink-based path traversal in rel_path_cached and atomic_write_bytes

Two symlink safety fixes:

1. rel_path_cached(): Now canonicalizes the target path (resolving
   symlinks) before comparing against canonical_base. Previously, a
   symlink inside the archive could trick strip_prefix into accepting
   a path that actually points outside the archive root. Falls back to
   manual normalization for paths that don't exist on disk yet.

2. atomic_write_bytes(): Checks fs::symlink_metadata() before writing.
   If the destination is a symlink, refuses to write with an explicit
   error. Prevents writing through symlinks that escape the archive.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
